word: H7383 - רִיפָה - rîyphâh - ree-faw' - Ground corn

sections.paragraph:
Original: רפה ריפה

Transliteration: rı̂yphâh riphâh

Phonetic: ree-faw'

BDB Definition:

  1. a grain or fruit (for grinding)
    1. meaning dubious

Origin: from H7322

TWOT entry: 2160a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
